concepts.meaning: 125-layer manifold: target=X, basis=X:OPERATOR, top=X:Information@0.439 | X:Existence_Contrast@0.106 | X:Existence_Polarity@0.030 | X:Existence_Magnitude@0.030 | X:Existence_Cost@0.030

A.label: understanding
A.summary: Meaning becomes interpretation: selective fit that can model, correct, and steer within a limit.

B.label: structure
B.summary: Meaning becomes information: a bounded form that can hold distinctions and carry record.

N.label: potential
N.summary: Meaning becomes change-pressure: the latent capacity for motion, work, or transformation.

T.label: causality
T.summary: Meaning becomes sequence: a relation between states rather than a frozen thing.

X.label: unity
X.summary: Meaning begins as the bare distinction that lets something be this instead of not-this.

dominant_meaning_form.label: identity
dominant_meaning_form.summary: Existence bounded by a limit becomes this rather than that: an identifiable thing with a skin.

proposition.subject: prism stone
proposition.text: prism stone means grounded recall in this thread.

focus_claim.subject: prism stone
focus_claim.summary: prism stone means grounded recall in this thread
focus_claim.text: prism stone means grounded recall in this thread.

meaning_forms.label: identity
meaning_forms.summary: Existence bounded by a limit becomes this rather than that: an identifiable thing with a skin.

meaning_forms.label: recognition
meaning_forms.summary: Existence reflected through interpretive selection becomes the first internal yes: the 'I am'.

meaning_forms.label: magnitude
meaning_forms.summary: Existence under energy becomes intensity: the amount of reality or force occupying a state.

meaning_forms.label: map
meaning_forms.summary: Boundary interpreted from within becomes a translator: an internal model of the limit itself.

meaning_forms.label: tension
meaning_forms.summary: Potential meeting a limit becomes held pressure: a loaded structure ready to do work.

meaning_forms.label: force
meaning_forms.summary: Potential under selection becomes controlled power: energy directed instead of merely dissipated.

dominant_slot.description: Existence's operator law (admissibility and presence) expressed through Agency's domain (correction, choice, and authorship). The existential lens asks: what is the irreducible rule this constraint enforces?
